ddls:
CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Hypermarkets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the channel operates in */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (e.g., physical, online) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the channel */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the channel was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the owner */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the owner was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the owner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the brand */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the brand (e.g., food, electronics) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the brand was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brands_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock keeping unit identifier */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand it belongs to */,
  "pack_size" INTEGER /* Size of the product pack */,
  "pack_type" TEXT /* Type of pack (e.g., Standard, Deluxe) */,
  "price_tier" TEXT /* Tier of pricing (e.g., Budget, Regular) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pack_types" (
  "pack_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pack type */,
  "pack_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pack type (e.g., Standard, Deluxe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pack type */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the pack */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the pack type was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the pack type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pack_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_tiers" (
  "price_tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the price tier (e.g., Budget, Regular) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the price tier */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price for the tier */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price for the tier */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the price tier was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the price tier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., unit sales, sales value) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the metric measures */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the metric was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_metrics" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution metric */,
  "distribution_name" TEXT /* Name of the distribution metric (e.g., shelf space, store count) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the distribution metric measures */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the metric was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost type */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., cost of goods sold, indirect costs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost type */,
  "cost_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cost type */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the cost type was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the cost type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the user was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
